messages.subject: [RsR] R Code for Constrained M (CM) estimator.

messages.body_plain:
Please can anyone help me with raw R code for implementing Constrained M
(CM) estimator. I am working on its extension to other area in statistics.
My email is ogundele.olaniyi at fupre.edu.ng. Thanks.

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
